questions.question: Which file often contains a certificate signing request?
questions.description: A CSR includes public key and identity information to be signed by a CA.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of a CRL?
questions.description: A certificate revocation list identifies certificates that should no longer be trusted.

questions.question: Which certificate is normally trusted directly by operating systems or browsers?
questions.description: Root CA certificates are distributed through trust stores and anchor validation chains.
